# Stage 13 portable fixture corpus

These small, deterministic `.rabbithole` files exercise the persisted and portable data boundary. Assets are intentionally tiny. The exact 20 MB asset and its one-byte-over companion are generated by `stage13-data-edges-verify.mjs`; large binaries must not be added here.

| Fixture | Exercises |
|---|---|
| `01-empty-root.rabbithole` | Empty, single-root hole. |
| `02-math-heavy.rabbithole` | All supported math delimiter families and dense TeX escapes. |
| `03-show-fences.rabbithole` | Multiple `show` fence types, including unknown content. |
| `04-assets-png-svg.rabbithole` | Two small base64 assets referenced from markdown. |
| `05-deep-lineage.rabbithole` | Seven-level parent lineage. |
| `06-browser-pending-partial.rabbithole` | Browser durable-ask semantics: pending with partial markdown retained. |
| `07-mcp-pending-empty.rabbithole` | MCP durable-ask semantics: pending with markdown emptied. |
| `08-unicode-emoji.rabbithole` | Accents, CJK, Indic scripts, and emoji in titles/body. |
| `09-rtl-titles.rabbithole` | Arabic and Hebrew/RTL titles. |
| `10-schema-null-legacy.rabbithole` | Explicit `schema_version: null` and missing legacy node defaults. |
| `11-v02-legacy.rabbithole` | v0.2-era unstamped shape mirroring stage9, including base-URL backfill. |
| `12-very-wide.rabbithole` | Root with 32 sibling nodes. |
| `13-code-fences.rabbithole` | Backticks, template syntax, and multiple code languages. |
| `14-base-url.rabbithole` | Explicit and inherited base-URL metadata. |
| `15-view-state.rabbithole` | Persisted canvas view and scroll state. |
| `16-collapsed-sized.rabbithole` | Position, size, font scale, and collapsed layout fields. |
| `17-origin-metadata.rabbithole` | Structured origin metadata. |
| `18-mixed-status.rabbithole` | Answered and pending siblings plus read flags. |
| `19-special-text.rabbithole` | HTML-like text, quotes, ampersands, and escaped separators. |
| `20-multi-assets.rabbithole` | Several allowed asset extensions in one portable file. |
